title: ai-codex-skill-larena Graph DNA
purpose: Define and evolve the repo-local GrowGraph companion layer for ai-codex-skill-larena.
evolution_vector: Keep Larena platform boundaries, package contracts, update flows, SitePack bridge, Docara proof and release gates explicit without moving domain ownership out of the Larena skill.
non_negotiable_principles: Larena owns Larena platform meaning and package boundaries.
Generated graph artifacts are advisory until canonical migration is accepted.
Companion skills keep their own domains.
Graph evidence must preserve source boundaries and avoid secrets.
success_criteria: Larena context can be routed through compact graph artifacts.
Semantic preservation is checked before claiming adoption.
Effectiveness is measured against raw-source-only work.
Federation integration can validate the repo-local companion layer.
